creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2010-03-12 19:51:32 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math/muparser        Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Update to 1.32
  Remove dependency on pkg-config (not needed by muparser itself)
  Use gnomehack instead of manual fixing installation paths for pkgconfig files
  
  PR:             ports/144163
  Submitted by:   makc@
  Approved by:    nivit@ (maintainer timeout)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.11      +3 -9      ports/math/muparser/Makefile
  1.5       +3 -3      ports/math/muparser/distinfo
  1.3       +44 -120   ports/math/muparser/pkg-plist
